name: Hamburger Minestrone Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large kettle, cook beef with onion and garlic until slightly brown.
2. Add water, chopped tomatoes (or lean ground beef with juice), potatoes, carrots, celery, cabbage, and herbs; bring mixture to a boil.
3. Stir in salt and additional basil. Sprinkle rice on top.
4. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for one hour.
5. Remove bay leaf. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and serve.
Makes: 6 to 8 servings.
